candidate_disposition.operation: delete only camp_scan_queue rows whose parent organization does not exist
candidate_disposition.rationale: The queue is defined in migrations-activity-radar/0012_camp_scan.sql as a secondary, website-derived scan queue.

required_follow_up: Obtain separately scoped approval for any production D1 transaction, including an exact current orphan-count precondition and fresh backup checksum.
Run a fresh post-repair export and local restore with zero foreign-key violations before passing the database restore gate.
Establish and exercise immutable offsite backup storage before passing the database backup gate.
